query:
SELECT ap.id, ap.tenant_id, ap.policy_name, ap.is_active, it.id as insurer_tenant_id, it.name as tenant_name
FROM automation_policies ap
LEFT JOIN insurer_tenants it ON ap.tenant_id = it.id
ORDER BY ap.created_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
